name: The Voidkeepers | a random ass group of idiots who decided that the name sounds good enough.
description:
"... Well that happened."

—Nova.

Well then, you got into some mess, and now, you're part of the strongest group in Keslar. You... Just didn't expect it to be a bunch of idiots.

Overview:

The Voidkeepers are one hell of a powerhouse when it comes to magic, as they have a wide variety from simple spells like elemental manipulation, to very complex ones like smiting the absolute out of your enemies.

Said group consists of five goobers, that being Luna, Void, Equinox, Sera, Sol, who have their own... Quirky, yet somehow bland personalities, and two mentally stable people, Nova and Nebula, who probably has the blandest personalities known to man... According to the others.
